summary: Iteration 2 (UI/UX overhaul + i18n EN/TR/AR + Invoice Breakdown + Deduction Banner) testing complete. Backend regression suite (12 pytest cases) still 100% green. All requested UI flows verified end-to-end: exact Excel values, deduction banner color/text states, invoice breakdown card visibility, KDV analysis, rate-required warning + save-button disable, save→history→print→delete, language switching with localStorage persistence + RTL on Arabic, NO Excel cell references visible anywhere in UI or print page, settings dialog live recalc, and final reset to kdv=10/div=2.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n.jsx: t() falls back to English when key missing; good. translations object is large; could be split per-locale via dynamic import for bundle size, low priority.
ResultsPanel: hex-based Tailwind arbitrary classes (e.g. bg-[#CC8A3A]/10) work but couple component to design tokens — consider extracting to tailwind theme.
VoucherDashboard: settings PUT response is trusted to update state; if backend returned partial Settings, UI would silently drop fields — currently returns full Settings so safe.
PrintVoucher (verified manually via /print/{id}) honors current language and RTL — confirmed AR receipt title 'سند تحصيل' renders with dir=rtl.
Backend compute() raises HTTPException inside a pure helper (carried over from iteration 1). Still acceptable, not a regression.
Review_request listed testid 'input-company' but actual testid is 'input-company-name' — minor doc mismatch in the iteration brief, not a code bug.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_PWAuto voucher during playwright run and deleted it. Settings put to 20/4 then reset to 10/2 — verified GET /api/settings == {kdv_rate:10, invoice_divisor:2}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (12 cases, all pass). Public URL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Form testids: input-d17, input-d21, input-i17, input-company-name (NOT input-company), input-customer-code, input-invoice-no, input-voucher-date. Results testids: result-d17/19/21/23/25/27, result-i19/21/23/25, invoice-before-kdv, invoice-kdv-amount, invoice-after-kdv, invoice-total-usd, deduction-status, validation-indicator. History row testids: voucher-row-{id}, print-voucher-{id}, delete-voucher-{id}. Lang switcher: lang-btn-en/tr/ar; persists in localStorage app_lang; AR sets document.documentElement.dir='rtl'.
